c.d: Number of active users on the platform; a higher number indicates a larger potential audience.
Variety of communication tools offered, such as text messaging, voice calls, video calls, and group chats.
Range of content types that can be shared, including photos, videos, stories, and live streams.
c.s: St Christopher's Inns, Symptoms of Living

c.d: Options available for managing privacy, such as setting message expiration times and controlling who can view content.
Distinctive functionalities that differentiate the app from its competitors, such as ephemeral content, audio-first communication, or community-building tools.
